settings.title: Islamic Calligraphy
settings.lede: Ayat, names and duas cut clean from a single continuous line of steel. Every pattern is vectorized from your reference — a photo of a page, a screenshot, even a rough sketch — then cut fresh per order for walls, clocks, gates and mosque interiors.

settings.title:
Pattern
Reference.
settings.description: A sample of forms we've cut — Ayat al-Kursi, 99 Names, mosque wall screens, and custom dua panels.

settings.title: Share The Text
settings.description: Send the exact Ayat, name or dua, plus a reference image of the script style you like.

settings.title: Vector Proof
settings.description: We trace it into a single cuttable line and send you a proof to approve before anything is cut.

settings.title: Cut & Finish
settings.description: Laser cut to size, deburred, and finished in matte black, raw steel or golden PVD.

settings.title:
Text To
Steel.
settings.description: Calligraphy needs one extra step most parts don't — getting the script right before it's ever cut.

settings.question: Can you cut a script I don't have a clean image of?
settings.answer: Yes — a phone photo of a printed page or even a hand-sketch is enough to start a vector proof from.

settings.question: Do you do wall-mounted panels, not just clocks?
settings.answer: Yes, any size up to 4×8ft in one piece, larger by joining panels — priced by sq.ft.

settings.question: What if the proof needs a correction?
settings.answer: Unlimited revisions on the vector proof — nothing goes to the laser until you approve the text.

settings.title:
Calligraphy
Pieces In Stock.
settings.description: These ship from an existing cut file — pick a size and finish and it goes straight to production.
